fields.name: ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the Power BI report or workspace.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the line (e.g. workspace or report).

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the Power BI report or workspace.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this report is enabled to be shown in the given page. This field has no effect for workspaces.

fields.name: WorkspaceID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the workspace that this record is in (if the record is a workspace, this is the same as the ID).

fields.name: WorkspaceName
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the workspace that this record is in (if the record is a workspace, this is the same as the Name).
